abort.reconfigure_successful:
Reconfiguration was successful. Update your Colota app webhook URL to:

`{webhook_url}`

See the documentation at {docs_url} for further details.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single configuration possible.
abort.webhook_not_internet_accessible: Your Home Assistant instance needs to be accessible from the internet to receive webhook messages.

create_entry.default:
To send location updates from Colota to Home Assistant, set the endpoint in the Colota app (Settings > API Settings) to:

`{webhook_url}`

No authentication is needed. For the best experience, select the Home Assistant API template.

See the documentation at {docs_url} for further details.

reconfigure.description: Are you sure you want to reconfigure the Colota webhook?
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Colota webhook

user.description: Are you sure you want to set up the Colota webhook?
